chapters.title: Pine Road After Dark
chapters.tagline: Pip knows why the mile-stones have begun walking.

chapters.title: The Hounds' First Oath
chapters.tagline: Three wet noses find a trail no map admits.

chapters.title: Foxfire Toll
chapters.tagline: The cheapest bridge asks for the dearest memory.

chapters.title: Miller's Moon
chapters.tagline: A village grinds flour for guests who died last winter.

chapters.title: Roots Beneath Frostford
chapters.tagline: The town's foundations remember an older forest.

chapters.title: The Last Honest Signpost
chapters.tagline: Every arrow points toward trouble, which is unusually helpful.

chapters.title: Crows Over Cart-Rut
chapters.tagline: Corv's census has three hundred missing names.

chapters.title: The Goblin Parliament
chapters.tagline: Democracy arrives carrying seventeen knives.

chapters.title: Mud-Crown Market
chapters.tagline: Anything can be bought, including yesterday.

chapters.title: Fort Splinter
chapters.tagline: A wooden fort prepares for a war nobody declared.

chapters.title: The Banner That Bites
chapters.tagline: Stolen names twitch in the seams.

chapters.title: Road-King's Reckoning
chapters.tagline: Mercy, law, or terror will decide who owns the ruts.

chapters.title: Bread and Bear Law
chapters.tagline: Bruna arbitrates a bakery dispute with one enormous paw.

chapters.title: The Seven Forge Feud
chapters.tagline: Seven smiths, one meteor, and no patience.

chapters.title: Ulfric's Winter Run
chapters.tagline: The pack hunts the thing that has learned their howls.

chapters.title: Thane Under the Mountain
chapters.tagline: An old oath knocks from beneath the banquet hall.

chapters.title: Cindersong Rebellion
chapters.tagline: The forge apprentices sing sparks into weapons.

chapters.title: Stair of a Thousand Sparks
chapters.tagline: Each step asks what kind of crown deserves a forge.

chapters.title: Antlers in the Ruin
chapters.tagline: Aelwyn leads the party where architecture grows leaves.

chapters.title: The Sleeping Scale
chapters.tagline: Rusty finds a dragon scale warm enough to dream.

chapters.title: Choir of Empty Helms
chapters.tagline: Armor sings of heroes who never existed.

chapters.title: Skybridge of Feathers
chapters.tagline: Corv's shortest route is mostly falling.

chapters.title: The Wyrm's Library
chapters.tagline: Books shelve readers according to destiny.

chapters.title: Thunder in the Nest
chapters.tagline: A stolen egg puts every mountain under suspicion.

chapters.title: Bellweather Ferry
chapters.tagline: The river charges one secret per passenger.

chapters.title: Reed-Crown Court
chapters.tagline: Frogs, nobles, and frog nobles debate the flood.

chapters.title: The City Behind Fog
chapters.tagline: A whole city appears only when nobody looks for it.

chapters.title: Three Claimants' War
chapters.tagline: Each ruler offers peace with a different knife behind it.

chapters.title: Nyx's Glass Orchard
chapters.tagline: Black fruit shows the future that wants you most.

chapters.title: Siege of Misty Lanterns
chapters.tagline: A thousand lights march where no army stands.

chapters.title: Road of Warm Ash
chapters.tagline: Footprints ahead belong to the party tomorrow.

chapters.title: The Soot Monastery
chapters.tagline: Silent monks keep one dangerously loud bell.

chapters.title: Pilgrims of Black Glass
chapters.tagline: Nyx's faithful offer gifts with invisible strings.

chapters.title: Crown-Shard Mine
chapters.tagline: Miners dig for authority and strike a buried command.

chapters.title: Feast of Hollow Plates
chapters.tagline: The banquet consumes the appetite of every guest.

chapters.title: Ash at the Campfire
chapters.tagline: Justin, Rusty, and Elisha finally say what the road has cost.

chapters.title: Council of Teeth and Hands
chapters.tagline: Ulfric demands equal pawprints on every treaty.

chapters.title: Corv's Unwritten Names
chapters.tagline: The raven's missing ledger pages predict betrayals.

chapters.title: The Houndmoon Muster
chapters.tagline: Every loyal beast answers one impossible whistle.

chapters.title: Siege of Ember Hold
chapters.tagline: Old friends defend walls against an enemy wearing their faces.

chapters.title: The Wild Law Trial
chapters.tagline: Aelwyn asks the fellowship to defend humanity before the beasts.

chapters.title: March of Three Banners
chapters.tagline: Pack, hold, and ash advance beneath one uneasy sky.

chapters.title: Starless Ford
chapters.tagline: The river reflects a sky where the World-Eater has already won.

chapters.title: Pip and the Impossible Door
chapters.tagline: The smallest fox steals a key from the end of time.

chapters.title: Ulfric's Last Hunt
chapters.tagline: The wolf pursues the herald that cannot be smelled.

chapters.title: Corv at World's Edge
chapters.tagline: One final census counts the living, dead, and undecided.

chapters.title: Bruna Holds the Pass
chapters.tagline: The bear plants her feet against an army.

chapters.title: Aelwyn's Dying Grove
chapters.tagline: Saving the sacred trees may cost the road to the gate.

chapters.title: Nyx Uncoiled
chapters.tagline: The serpent reveals which bargains were warnings.

chapters.title: Road to the Last Council
chapters.tagline: Three friends, three hounds, and every consequence walk together.

nodes.title: Pine Road After Dark: Arrival
nodes.body:
Pip knows why the mile-stones have begun walking. In this chapter of The Foxfire Roads, Justin, Rusty, Elisha, and the hounds cross pine road while Frostford's winter stores vanish along roads that move after moonrise.

The forest frames the moment like a bright ink panel: funny at the edges, dangerous in the center.

nodes.title: Pine Road After Dark: Fork in the Trail
nodes.body:
Pip knows why the mile-stones have begun walking. In this chapter of The Foxfire Roads, Justin, Rusty, Elisha, and the hounds cross pine road while Frostford's winter stores vanish along roads that move after moonrise.

Three routes open: a moss-soft animal trail, an oath-marked hold road, and a copper-lit cut through forbidden ground.

choices.label: Trust the pack
choices.approach: Let the hounds lead; read spoor, wind, and frightened birds.

outcome.text: The hounds choose a living road through Pine Road After Dark. Pip calls it obvious after the danger passes.

choices.label: Keep faith with the holds
choices.approach: Protect travelers, honor local law, and leave the road safer.

outcome.text: Justin sets the watch, Rusty steadies the line, and Elisha gets everyone home from Pine Road After Dark.

choices.label: Take the dangerous shortcut
choices.approach: Use the black-glass whisper before it can name its price.

outcome.text: Power folds the road through Pine Road After Dark. Nyx smiles somewhere just outside the panel.

nodes.title: Pine Road After Dark: Roadwork
nodes.body:
Pip knows why the mile-stones have begun walking. In this chapter of The Foxfire Roads, Justin, Rusty, Elisha, and the hounds cross pine road while Frostford's winter stores vanish along roads that move after moonrise.

Days pass in playable journeys: trail puzzles, camp meals, hound training, foraging, local favors, hidden caves, and hard-won miles.

nodes.title: Pine Road After Dark: Campfire Counsel
nodes.body: “We can debate after stew. We can fight after seconds.”
nodes.speaker: Bruna

outcome.text: Power folds the road through Pine Road After Dark. Nyx smiles somewhere just outside the panel.

nodes.title: Pine Road After Dark: First Clash
nodes.body: The Lantern-Tail Gang blocks the next panel. The encounter supports a full battle, a clever skill check, or coordinated hound work; every route advances the chronicle.

choices.label: Stand and fight
choices.approach: Use the whole hotbar and keep the hounds out of the red arcs.

outcome.text: The Lantern-Tail Gang breaks before three friends fighting as one.

choices.label: Turn the terrain against it
choices.approach: Read the scene, spring the trap, and win without trading every blow.

success.text: Elisha spots the hinge in the battlefield. The whole threat folds around it.

fail.text: The clever plan becomes a loud plan, but Rusty drags it over the line.

choices.label: Run the hound maneuver
choices.approach: Justin calls the turn while three hounds split the enemy's attention.

outcome.text: Claws drum over roots. The hounds return muddy, triumphant, and expecting treats.

nodes.title: Roots Beneath Frostford: Road Onward

nodes.title: Thunder in the Nest: Road Onward
nodes.body:
A stolen egg puts every mountain under suspicion. In this chapter of The Wyrm's Long Echo, Justin, Rusty, Elisha, and the hounds cross thunder nest while dragon whispers wake ruins, cults, and memories across the high forest.

Days pass in playable journeys: trail puzzles, camp meals, hound training, foraging, local favors, hidden caves, and hard-won miles.

A thousand lights march where no army stands. In this chapter of Kingdoms in the Fog, Justin, Rusty, Elisha, and the hounds cross misty siege while three rival claimants turn the mist country into a war of promises.

Three routes open: a moss-soft animal trail, an oath-marked hold road, and a copper-lit cut through forbidden ground.

choices.label: Trust the pack
choices.approach: Let the hounds lead; read spoor, wind, and frightened birds.

outcome.text: The hounds choose a living road through Siege of Misty Lanterns. Pip calls it obvious after the danger passes.

choices.label: Keep faith with the holds
choices.approach: Protect travelers, honor local law, and leave the road safer.

outcome.text: Justin sets the watch, Rusty steadies the line, and Elisha gets everyone home from Siege of Misty Lanterns.

choices.label: Take the dangerous shortcut
choices.approach: Use the black-glass whisper before it can name its price.

outcome.text: Power folds the road through Siege of Misty Lanterns. Nyx smiles somewhere just outside the panel.

nodes.title: Siege of Misty Lanterns: A Friend's Doubt
nodes.body: “Big chapter. Small fox. Sensible odds.” A thousand lights march where no army stands.

nodes.title: Siege of Misty Lanterns: Midnight Ambush
nodes.body: The Lantern General blocks the next panel. The encounter supports a full battle, a clever skill check, or coordinated hound work; every route advances the chronicle.

choices.label: Stand and fight
choices.approach: Use the whole hotbar and keep the hounds out of the red arcs.

outcome.text: The Lantern General breaks before three friends fighting as one.

choices.label: Turn the terrain against it
choices.approach: Read the scene, spring the trap, and win without trading every blow.

success.text: Elisha spots the hinge in the battlefield. The whole threat folds around it.

fail.text: The clever plan becomes a loud plan, but Rusty drags it over the line.

choices.label: Run the hound maneuver
choices.approach: Justin calls the turn while three hounds split the enemy's attention.

outcome.text: Claws drum over roots. The hounds return muddy, triumphant, and expecting treats.

nodes.title: Road of Warm Ash: Arrival
nodes.body:
Footprints ahead belong to the party tomorrow. In this chapter of The Ashen Pilgrimage, Justin, Rusty, Elisha, and the hounds cross warm ash road while Nyx's black-glass road offers power while quietly dividing the fellowship.

The forest frames the moment like a bright ink panel: funny at the edges, dangerous in the center.

Three routes open: a moss-soft animal trail, an oath-marked hold road, and a copper-lit cut through forbidden ground.

choices.label: Trust the pack
choices.approach: Let the hounds lead; read spoor, wind, and frightened birds.

outcome.text: The hounds choose a living road through Feast of Hollow Plates. Pip calls it obvious after the danger passes.

choices.label: Keep faith with the holds
choices.approach: Protect travelers, honor local law, and leave the road safer.

outcome.text: Justin sets the watch, Rusty steadies the line, and Elisha gets everyone home from Feast of Hollow Plates.

choices.label: Take the dangerous shortcut
choices.approach: Use the black-glass whisper before it can name its price.

outcome.text: Power folds the road through Feast of Hollow Plates. Nyx smiles somewhere just outside the panel.

nodes.title: Feast of Hollow Plates: Chapter Reckoning
nodes.body: Lady Starveling blocks the next panel. The encounter supports a full battle, a clever skill check, or coordinated hound work; every route advances the chronicle.

choices.label: Finish the chapter battle
choices.approach: Use the whole hotbar and keep the hounds out of the red arcs.

outcome.text: Lady Starveling breaks before three friends fighting as one.

choices.label: Turn the terrain against it
choices.approach: Read the scene, spring the trap, and win without trading every blow.

success.text: Elisha spots the hinge in the battlefield. The whole threat folds around it.

fail.text: The clever plan becomes a loud plan, but Rusty drags it over the line.

choices.label: Run the hound maneuver
choices.approach: Justin calls the turn while three hounds split the enemy's attention.

outcome.text: Claws drum over roots. The hounds return muddy, triumphant, and expecting treats.

nodes.title: Council of Teeth and Hands: Arrival
nodes.body:
Ulfric demands equal pawprints on every treaty. In this chapter of The Broken Fellowship, Justin, Rusty, Elisha, and the hounds cross teeth hands while beasts and holds must unite before the World-Eater's heralds count them separately.

The forest frames the moment like a bright ink panel: funny at the edges, dangerous in the center.

nodes.title: Corv's Unwritten Names: The Long Way Around

The raven's missing ledger pages predict betrayals. In this chapter of The Broken Fellowship, Justin, Rusty, Elisha, and the hounds cross unwritten names while beasts and holds must unite before the World-Eater's heralds count them separately.

Days pass in playable journeys: trail puzzles, camp meals, hound training, foraging, local favors, hidden caves, and hard-won miles.

nodes.title: Corv's Unwritten Names: Midnight Ambush
nodes.body: The Ink Wraith blocks the next panel. The encounter supports a full battle, a clever skill check, or coordinated hound work; every route advances the chronicle.

choices.label: Stand and fight

Aelwyn asks the fellowship to defend humanity before the beasts. In this chapter of The Broken Fellowship, Justin, Rusty, Elisha, and the hounds cross wild law trial while beasts and holds must unite before the World-Eater's heralds count them separately.

Days pass in playable journeys: trail puzzles, camp meals, hound training, foraging, local favors, hidden caves, and hard-won miles.

nodes.title: The Wild Law Trial: Campfire Counsel
nodes.body: Elisha studies the hounds, then the road. “We decide together. Even when it is slow.”
nodes.speaker: Elisha

choices.label: Trust the pack
choices.approach: Let the hounds lead; read spoor, wind, and frightened birds.

outcome.text: The hounds choose a living road through The Wild Law Trial. Pip calls it obvious after the danger passes.

choices.label: Keep faith with the holds
choices.approach: Protect travelers, honor local law, and leave the road safer.

outcome.text: Justin sets the watch, Rusty steadies the line, and Elisha gets everyone home from The Wild Law Trial.

choices.label: Take the dangerous shortcut
choices.approach: Use the black-glass whisper before it can name its price.

outcome.text: Power folds the road through The Wild Law Trial. Nyx smiles somewhere just outside the panel.

nodes.title: The Wild Law Trial: First Clash
nodes.body: The Thorn Tribunal blocks the next panel. The encounter supports a full battle, a clever skill check, or coordinated hound work; every route advances the chronicle.

choices.label: Stand and fight
choices.approach: Use the whole hotbar and keep the hounds out of the red arcs.

outcome.text: The Thorn Tribunal breaks before three friends fighting as one.

choices.label: Turn the terrain against it
choices.approach: Read the scene, spring the trap, and win without trading every blow.

success.text: Elisha spots the hinge in the battlefield. The whole threat folds around it.

fail.text: The clever plan becomes a loud plan, but Rusty drags it over the line.

choices.label: Run the hound maneuver
choices.approach: Justin calls the turn while three hounds split the enemy's attention.

outcome.text: Claws drum over roots. The hounds return muddy, triumphant, and expecting treats.

nodes.title: Starless Ford: Arrival
nodes.body:
The river reflects a sky where the World-Eater has already won. In this chapter of The Last Wild March, Justin, Rusty, Elisha, and the hounds cross starless ford while all roads collapse toward the final gate and every old promise comes due.

The forest frames the moment like a bright ink panel: funny at the edges, dangerous in the center.

One final census counts the living, dead, and undecided. In this chapter of The Last Wild March, Justin, Rusty, Elisha, and the hounds cross worlds edge while all roads collapse toward the final gate and every old promise comes due.

Days pass in playable journeys: trail puzzles, camp meals, hound training, foraging, local favors, hidden caves, and hard-won miles.

nodes.title: Corv at World's Edge: Midnight Ambush
nodes.body: The Last Enumerator blocks the next panel. The encounter supports a full battle, a clever skill check, or coordinated hound work; every route advances the chronicle.

choices.label: Stand and fight
choices.approach: Use the whole hotbar and keep the hounds out of the red arcs.

outcome.text: The Last Enumerator breaks before three friends fighting as one.

choices.label: Turn the terrain against it
choices.approach: Read the scene, spring the trap, and win without trading every blow.

success.text: Elisha spots the hinge in the battlefield. The whole threat folds around it.

fail.text: The clever plan becomes a loud plan, but Rusty drags it over the line.

choices.label: Run the hound maneuver
choices.approach: Justin calls the turn while three hounds split the enemy's attention.

outcome.text: Claws drum over roots. The hounds return muddy, triumphant, and expecting treats.
